hooks.command: bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Nao edite diretamente na branch main/master" >&2; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r .file_path 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(env|key|pem|secret)$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Arquivo sensivel detectado — use .env.example como template" >&2; exit 1; fi'
bash -c 'FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r .file_path 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|html|md)$"; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi'
bash -c 'FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r .file_path 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$"; then npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f tsconfig.json ]; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>/dev/null; fi; if [ -f vitest.config.ts ] || [ -f vitest.config.js ]; then npx vitest run --reporter=verbose 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
